commands.name: download
commands.description: Downloads an OpenAPI description from multiple registries.

options.name: --log-level
options.description: The log level to use when logging messages to the main output. [default: Warning]

options.name: --clear-cache
options.description: Clears any cached data for the current command. [default: False]

options.name: --version
options.description: The version of the OpenAPI document to use. []

options.name: --clean-output
options.description: Removes all files from the output directory before generating the code files. [default: False]

options.name: --output
options.description: The output directory path for the generated code files. [default: ./output/result.json]

options.name: --disable-ssl-validation
options.description: Disables SSL certificate validation. [default: False]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generates a REST HTTP API client from an OpenAPI description file.

options.name: --openapi
options.description: The path or URI to the OpenAPI description file used to generate the code files.

options.name: --manifest
options.description: The path or URI to the API manifest file used to generate the code files. Append #apikey if the target manifest contains multiple API dependencies entries.

options.name: --output
options.description: The output directory path for the generated code files. [default: ./output]

options.name: --language
options.description: The target language for the generated code files.

options.name: --class-name
options.description: The class name to use for the core client class. [default: ApiClient]

options.name: --type-access-modifier
options.description: The type access modifier to use for the client types. [default: Public]

options.name: --namespace-name
options.description: The namespace to use for the core client class specified with the --class-name option. [default: ApiSdk]

options.name: --log-level
options.description: The log level to use when logging messages to the main output. [default: Warning]

options.name: --backing-store
options.description: Enables backing store for models. [default: False]

options.name: --exclude-backward-compatible
options.description: Excludes backward compatible and obsolete assets from the generated result. Should be used for new clients. [default: False]

options.name: --additional-data
options.description: Will include the 'AdditionalData' property for models. [default: True]

options.name: --serializer
options.description: The fully qualified class names for serializers. Accepts multiple values. Use `none` to generate a client without any serializer. [default: Microsoft.Kiota.Serialization.Json.JsonSerializationWriterFactory|Microsoft.Kiota.Serialization.Text.TextSerializationWriterFactory|Microsoft.Kiota.Serialization.Form.FormSerializationWriterFactory|Microsoft.Kiota.Serialization.Multipart.MultipartSerializationWriterFactory]

options.name: --deserializer
options.description: The fully qualified class names for deserializers. Accepts multiple values. Use `none` to generate a client without any deserializer. [default: Microsoft.Kiota.Serialization.Json.JsonParseNodeFactory|Microsoft.Kiota.Serialization.Text.TextParseNodeFactory|Microsoft.Kiota.Serialization.Form.FormParseNodeFactory]

options.name: --clean-output
options.description: Removes all files from the output directory before generating the code files. [default: False]

options.name: --structured-mime-types
options.description: The MIME types with optional priorities as defined in RFC9110 Accept header to use for structured data model generation. Accepts multiple values. [default: application/json|text/plain;q=0.9|application/x-www-form-urlencoded;q=0.2|multipart/form-data;q=0.1]

options.name: --include-path
options.description: The paths to include in the generation. Glob patterns accepted. Accepts multiple values. Append #OPERATION to the pattern to specify the operation to include. e.g. users/*/messages#GET []

options.name: --exclude-path
options.description: The paths to exclude from the generation. Glob patterns accepted. Accepts multiple values. Append #OPERATION to the pattern to specify the operation to exclude. e.g. users/*/messages#GET []

options.name: --disable-validation-rules
options.description: The OpenAPI description validation rules to disable. Accepts multiple values. []

options.name: --clear-cache
options.description: Clears any cached data for the current command. [default: False]

options.name: --disable-ssl-validation
options.description: Disables SSL certificate validation. [default: False]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: info
commands.description: Displays information about the languages supported by kiota and dependencies to add in your project.

options.name: --openapi
options.description: The path or URI to the OpenAPI description file used to generate the code files.

options.name: --manifest
options.description: The path or URI to the API manifest file used to generate the code files. Append #apikey if the target manifest contains multiple API dependencies entries.

options.name: --version
options.description: The version of the OpenAPI document to use. []

options.name: --log-level
options.description: The log level to use when logging messages to the main output. [default: Warning]

options.name: --clear-cache
options.description: Clears any cached data for the current command. [default: False]

options.name: --search-key
options.description: The API search key to display the description for. Use the search command to get the key. []

options.name: --language
options.description: The target language for the dependencies instructions.

options.name: --json
options.description: Generate a plain and machine-parsable json output.

options.name: --dependency-type
options.description: The type of dependency to display instructions for. []

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: rpc

options.name: --mode
options.description: Whether the RPC server should use stdin/stdout or a named pipe. [default: Stdio]

options.name: --pipe-name
options.description: The name of the named pipe to use for the RPC server. [default: KiotaJsonRpc]

commands.name: show
commands.description: Displays the API tree in a given description.

options.name: --search-key
options.description: The API search key to display the description for. Use the search command to get the key. []

options.name: --log-level
options.description: The log level to use when logging messages to the main output. [default: Warning]

options.name: --version
options.description: The version of the OpenAPI document to use. []

options.name: --openapi
options.description: The path or URI to the OpenAPI description file used to generate the code files.

options.name: --manifest
options.description: The path or URI to the API manifest file used to generate the code files. Append #apikey if the target manifest contains multiple API dependencies entries.

options.name: --max-depth
options.description: The maximum depth of the tree to display [default: 5]

options.name: --include-path
options.description: The paths to include in the generation. Glob patterns accepted. Accepts multiple values. Append #OPERATION to the pattern to specify the operation to include. e.g. users/*/messages#GET []

options.name: --exclude-path
options.description: The paths to exclude from the generation. Glob patterns accepted. Accepts multiple values. Append #OPERATION to the pattern to specify the operation to exclude. e.g. users/*/messages#GET []

options.name: --clear-cache
options.description: Clears any cached data for the current command. [default: False]

options.name: --disable-ssl-validation
options.description: Disables SSL certificate validation. [default: False]
